arts.ttl: Barcelona star rejected an €8 million January exit

arts.ttl: Barcelona's potential Champions League opponents for last 16
arts.sum: Barcelona's potential opponents in the Champions League last 16 ahead of the upcoming draw.

arts.ttl: Which Barca player is Flick’s best option to play the 10?
arts.sum: As things currently stand, it looks like Frenkie is the go to man in the double pivot, alongside Pedri, and Gavi has taken over the important job of the number 10 in Barcelona’s 4-2-3-1 formation. The other possible options are Gavi, Dani Olmo, and Fermín López, with poor Pablo Torre a long shot in spite of his strong performances in his cameo appearances so far.

arts.ttl: Barcelona trio nominated for La Liga awards
arts.sum: No fewer than three members of the first-team setup at La Liga leaders Barcelona have this week received nominations for awards. The trio in question? Pedri, Lamine Yamal, and Hansi…

arts.ttl: Barcelona ‘have entered the race’ for Marseille star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this week been credited with an interest in the signature of Olympique Marseille star Mason Greenwood. That’s according to European transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who…

arts.ttl: Yamal reveals which player gives him the best advice at Barca
arts.sum: The Barcelona teenager has been talking about the advice he receives from his team-mates and says the best words of wisdom come from a certain Brazilian. “I think that, of the veterans, because in the end the others are almost my age or two years older, he is the one I talk to the most and the one I have the best relationship with.
